title: Angel's Weather
description: The Weather Miracle • A full weather rework featuring high-fidelity audio, new snow, cloud, and fog variants, dynamic particle effects, and revamped biome colors.
body:
> ⭐ Upcoming Update: v1.9.2 will introduce settings and customization, new snow tech, new cloud tech, improved performance, enhanced visuals for existing elements, color reworks, and more. > ✨ **NOTICE:** Ongoing refurbishing of design appearance... ![Angel Weather Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pQrAkcwB/images/fb70338d245dc76eada58e58b2b043f47f120189.png 'If you see this, you are the best!')

> ### Selya’s Gratitude to You > > *With sincere gratitude for choosing Angel's Weather, we are honored by Her Majesty Selya’s blessing ~ one of her divine mirror stigmata creations, bestowed upon us.* > > ### What is a Stigmata Mirror? > > *A Stigmata Mirror is a creation of Selya, the Divine Seamstress of Realities. This mirror represents a fragment of reality itself. The more pieces you assemble, the larger the image becomes. What the full image reveals is a reflection of time, beauty, and your own place within it ~ a living, evolving part of the world.* > > **SELYA is the embodiment of light, the CREATION serves as the mirror, and YOU are its reflection.** ## This Stigmata Mirror Features **Core Features** * **Rain** – pleasing to behold, bringing ease and calm to your vision * **Snow** – delicate and pleasant, with refined detail * **Realistic Rain Sounds** – authentic recordings that create a dynamic, immersive atmosphere * **Realistic Thunder Sounds** – genuine thunder, balanced to be gentle on the ears * **Rain Splash Sounds** – adds depth and presence to your surroundings * **Ambience Sounds** – enriches and elevates the overall experience * **Animated Rain Splashes** – stylized effects that feel vivid and alive * **Handcrafted Cloud Design** – each cloud unique, as if carrying its own story **+Features — [Using Polytone Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)** * **[NEW] Reworked Biome Vegetation Color Palettes** – a revitalized, reimagined look for your world * **[NEW] Biome Fog Colors** – unique fog hues for overworld biomes and caves * **[NEW] Biome Sky Colors** – designed in harmony with fog for a seamless atmosphere * **Cloud Shading** – gentle shading that adds subtle depth to the clouds * **[NEW] Water Colors** – deeper shades in vast waters, lighter tones in shallow areas * **[NEW] Rain Particle System** – refined visuals with distinct states for rain and thunderstorms * **[NEW] Wind System** – influences rain and fog, adding subtle yet noticeable movement * **[NEW] Space-Aware Fog** – fog adapts to your position, interacting dynamically with the weather
🎙️ Background & Recording Journey All the sounds you’ll hear were captured during a 3-day journey deep in Mount Olympus National Park, where nature revealed its magic in the purest form. Armed with my Blue Ember XLR mic and Presonus Studio 26c, I spent hours recording rain, wind, splashes and soft breezes. I traversed some harsh terrain and shifting weather to reach the right spots, recording nature’s voice from every angle. What you’ll hear is just a glimpse of what I experienced out there. Hope it brings you even a fraction of the wonder it gave me.
🤝 Want to use the resourcepack? If you’d like to include this project in a modpack, adventure map, or server, just make sure to credit it by linking to the original source on **Modrinth** or **CurseForge**. ❤️
